text-about-introduction: Learn more about me through this page!
text-always-open-external-links-in-a-new: Always open external links in a new tab
text-artworks-and-videos-introduction: Welcome to view my personal artworks and videos through other platforms!
text-blogs-and-sponsor-introduction: Welcome to read my blogs about me or my projects!
text-chatting-introduction: Welcome to join my chat room for interaction!
text-email-description-1: Only topics about the Quanto Series are allowed
text-introduction-1: You might know me through my artworks and videos. You can view my more artworks from my Pixiv profile or my profile on other platforms.
text-introduction-2: You might also know me through softwares I made (such as Quanto Series). You can check my GitHub profile to view open source projects, or go to the Softwares page to see more.
text-introduction-3: I'm an amateur creator. I draw something, make video, and code sometimes.
text-profile-part-1: Pronunciation: /stiːv ɕy/. You can also call me "什五 (shí wǔ, ㄕˊ ㄨˇ or ジュウゴ)".
text-profile-part-2: I'm an amateur creator. I draw something and make video sometimes.
text-profile-part-4: I want to create more, code more and sleep more.
text-quanto-series-description: Quanto Series is a collaboration of open source projects named starting with Quanto, which are desktop customization tools based on Rainmeter.
text-quantum-introduction: Quanto Series product updates and feedback channels, discussion group for desktop customization enthusiasts
text-warning-reset-description: If you choose to continue, this will clear your preferences, including language and color scheme settings. After clearing, you will be redirected to the homepage.
